---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Juxta
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's missing or frustrating today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, examples from other tools, or any other context.
